title: Savory Dense Light Blackberries Crumble
description: A savory and light Slovakian dish featuring blackberries in a dairy-free crumble topping that is both comforting and refreshing.

ingredients.name: 2 cups fresh or frozen blackberries
ingredients.notes: fresh berries can be used if desired

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: optional for sweetness, but not necessary for dairy-free version

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped nuts (optional, such as almonds or walnuts)
ingredients.notes: such as almonds or walnuts for texture and flavor

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons maple syrup (or agave nectar for vegan option)

instructions: Stem and quarter the blackberries, then crush them slightly using a spoon or fork.
In a mixing bowl, combine the crushed blackberries with lemon juice and sugar. Mix well until all berries are coated.
Sift in flour and gently fold into the berry mixture to help thicken it without making it too stiff for topping.
In a separate bowl, mix rolled oats with maple syrup (if using) and dark chocolate chips (optional).
Pour the blackberry mixture onto a baking dish or pie pan. Spread evenly over the bottom.
Sprinkle the oat flour mixture on top of the blackberries in an even layer.
Bake at 350°F for about 25-30 minutes, until golden brown and bubbly.
Cool slightly before serving with a dollop of dairy-free yogurt or whipped cream if desired.
